heading: Nonliability of United States
label: 2105 Nonliability of United States
text: The Government of the United States shall have no liability in connection with any housing unit, or necessary land therefor, or adaptation acquired under the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior section 2105, , , , related to administration of mustering-out payments provisions, prior to repeal by , , , effective .Pub. L. 85–85772 Stat. 1224Pub. L. 89–50, § 1(a)79 Stat. 173Sept. 2, 1958June 24, 1965July 1, 1966
